required_inputs: controlling lock and slice mapping refs
required_outputs: one machine-checkable stage report mapping contract items to planned code surfaces
success_predicate: the worker has materialized a durable semantic bridge from starter contract to intended code surfaces before mutating code
forbidden_shortcuts: starting live code mutation before materializing the semantic-ir bridge
keeping the contract-to-code mapping only in hidden reasoning
editing outside the allowed write scope
steps.escalate_if_fail: emit scope or finish-line blocker and wait

success_predicate: all contract surfaces selected by the slice exist coherently in the assigned package lane
forbidden_shortcuts: only adding models without export surfaces when contract release is selected
only adding tests without contract surfaces
claiming completion while required package wiring is missing
steps.escalate_if_fail: emit exact missing-surface blocker and wait

required_outputs: targeted check results for the owned package lane
implementation worker baton with changed files, checks run, checks skipped, blockers, and readiness judgment
success_predicate: the bounded targeted checks selected by the finish line pass and the orchestrator can inspect implementation readiness without recovering hidden reasoning
required_checks: slice-local export-schema or replay checks when required by the lock
forbidden_shortcuts: claiming completion while targeted checks are red
pretending make check was run if it was intentionally skipped
steps.escalate_if_fail: emit exact failing check or missing-attestation blocker and wait
